title: SalesOutcomeRow
description:
A single benchmark observation row for a sales custom outcome metric. Emitted by gtm-backend and consumed by the Hokusai evaluation pipeline.

Schema version sentinel: schema_version must equal "sales_outcome_row/v1".

Metric name enum covers the four canonical sales:* Hokusai names.
Measurement policy enum covers all five recognized policy values; only four are mint-eligible (see docs/sales-custom-outcome-eval-contract.md).
The alias 'exact_observed' is NOT accepted; use 'exact_observed_output'.

schema_version.title: Schema Version
schema_version.description: Version sentinel for this row schema. Must be exactly "sales_outcome_row/v1".

row_id.title: Row ID
row_id.description: Unique identifier for this observation row (UUID or stable opaque string).

benchmark_spec_id.title: Benchmark Spec ID
benchmark_spec_id.description: ID of the BenchmarkSpec this row belongs to.

unit_id.title: Unit ID
unit_id.description: Identifier of the unit of analysis (prospect ID or message ID depending on unit_of_analysis).

unit_of_analysis.title: Unit of Analysis
unit_of_analysis.description: Observational unit for this row. Use 'prospect_conversation' for meeting-rate rows; 'prospect_message' for revenue, spam, and unsubscribe rows.

measurement_policy.title: Measurement Policy
measurement_policy.description: Measurement policy governing mint eligibility for this row. 'exact_observed' is NOT a valid value; use 'exact_observed_output'.

metric_name.title: Metric Name
metric_name.description: Canonical Hokusai sales metric name. One of the four sales:* names.

scorer_ref.title: Scorer Ref
scorer_ref.description: Scorer registry ref. Must match the registered scorer for the given metric_name (typically equal to metric_name).

message_count.title: Message Count
message_count.description: Total messages sent for this unit.

delivered_count.title: Delivered Count
delivered_count.description: Messages confirmed delivered for this unit.

numerator.title: Numerator
numerator.description: Numerator contribution (e.g., events observed: meetings booked, revenue in USD, complaint flags, unsubscribe flags).

denominator.title: Denominator
denominator.description: Denominator contribution (eligible observations for this row: conversations with observed labels, delivered messages, etc.).

observed_at.title: Observed At
observed_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when this row was observed or computed.

label_status.title: Label Status
label_status.description: Label availability status. 'observed': outcome label is available and confirmed. 'missing': no label and outcome window closed without an event. 'delayed': label not yet available (outcome window still open). 'partial': some but not all labels are available.

prospect_id.title: Prospect ID
prospect_id.description: Prospect (contact) identifier. Optional; required for prospect_conversation unit_of_analysis in some pipelines.

message_id.title: Message ID
message_id.description: Individual message identifier. Required for exact_observed_output policy to enable SHA-256 hash join.

arm.title: Arm
arm.description: A/B arm assignment. Expected values: 'treatment' or 'control'. Required for online_ab policy.

output_sha256.title: Output SHA-256
output_sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the generated message output, lowercase 0x-prefixed 64-hex. Required for exact_observed_output policy hash join.

label_observed_at.title: Label Observed At
label_observed_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp when the outcome label was observed (e.g., when the CRM event was recorded).

label_available_at.title: Label Available At
label_available_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp after which the outcome label is considered finalized (end of outcome window).

outcome_window_days.title: Outcome Window Days
outcome_window_days.description: Number of days after message send during which outcome events are collected.

coverage_fraction.title: Coverage Fraction
coverage_fraction.description: Fraction of expected labels that are available for this unit, in [0.0, 1.0]. Mint-eligible policies require coverage guardrails from eval_spec to pass.

qualified_meeting.title: Qualified Meeting
qualified_meeting.description: Whether a qualified meeting was booked for this prospect conversation. null means the label is unobserved and the row should be excluded from numerator and denominator.

revenue_amount_cents.title: Revenue Amount Cents
revenue_amount_cents.description: Revenue attributed to this row in cents (integer). Currency is USD unless revenue_currency specifies otherwise.

revenue_currency.title: Revenue Currency
revenue_currency.description: ISO 4217 three-letter currency code. Defaults to USD when omitted.

spam_complaint.title: Spam Complaint
spam_complaint.description: Whether a spam complaint was received for this delivered message. null means the event was not observed and the row's label status should be checked before inclusion.

unsubscribe.title: Unsubscribe
unsubscribe.description: Whether an unsubscribe event was received for this delivered message. null means the event was not observed and the row's label status should be checked before inclusion.

source_system.title: Source System
source_system.description: Identifier of the source system that produced this row (e.g., 'salesforce', 'hubspot', 'outreach').

metadata.title: Metadata
metadata.description: Arbitrary additional metadata for extensibility. Does not affect metric computation.
